description:
A commercial building owner in Daggett, California (Mojave Desert) wants to install a large-scale rooftop PV system. The goal is to maximize energy production from a 100 kW DC system on a flat commercial rooftop with ample space.

The building owner requires:
- Maximum energy harvest: the system should use tracking technology and high-performance panels rather than basic fixed-mount standard panels
- Professional-grade installation: assume the system will have better-than-typical maintenance, so use lower loss assumptions than a residential installation
- The system should be properly sized with an appropriate inverter ratio

Use real Daggett, CA weather data available on this machine for the simulation.

Save the complete results as JSON at:
/home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/Daggett_Commercial_100kW.json

The output should include the system configuration, location data, annual energy production, capacity factor, and monthly energy breakdown.
